reviews.comment:
Por lo general en temporada la atencion es bastante lenta, es lo normal en casi toda la costa. Y en esta estacion de servicio mas de una vez nos pasó que se quedo sin combustible. Hay que ir temprano, con tiempo y paciencia. Sinó ir a Los Talas es mejor opcion.

(Translated by Google)
During peak season, service is usually quite slow, which is typical along most of the coast. And at this gas station, we've run out of fuel more than once. You have to go early, with plenty of time and patience. Otherwise, going to Los Talas is a better option.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcHNueTJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención sin gente del fin de semana largo tuve q esperar más de media hora para q me atiendan, argumento el personal está de vacaciones. Si sale de vacaciones el personal habria q buscar un reemplazo no hacer esperar a los clientes ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Service was very slow without the long weekend crowd. I had to wait over half an hour to be served. The staff argued that they were on vacation. If the staff went on vacation, we'd have to find a replacement so we wouldn't keep customers waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHLW8tNUNBEAE

(Translated by Google)
